title: Immersive Engineering: Better Cloche
description: Adds new crafts to Cloche from Immersive Engineering
body:
Adds new crafts in Cloche from Immersive Engineering for vanilla and mods. I'm always open for suggestions to add compatibility with other mods. For now it has compatibility with:

- Vanilla:

  Oak Sapling -> 1 Oak log 100%, 1 apple 25%, 1 oak sapling 25%

  Birch Sapling -> 1 Birch log 100%, 1 birch sapling 25%

  Acacia Sapling -> 1 Acacia log 100%, 1 acacia sapling 25%

  Dark Oak Sapling -> 1 Dark oak log 100%, 1 dark oak sapling 25%

  Cherry Sapling -> 1 Cherry log 100%, 1 cherry sapling 25%

  Jungle Sapling -> 1 Jungle log 100%, 1 jungle sapling 25%

  Spruce Sapling -> 1 Spruce log 100%, 1 spruce sapling 25%

  Mangrove Propagule -> 1 Mangrove log 100%, 1 mangrove sapling 25%

  Azalea -> 1 Oak log 100%, 1 azalea 25%

  Flowering Azalea -> 1 Oak log 100%, 1 flowering azalea 25%

  Kelp -> 2 Kelp 100%

  Cocoa -> 1 Cocoa beans 100%, 1 cocoa beans 25%

  Crimson Fungus -> 1 Crimson stem 100%, 1 crimson fungus 25%

  Warped Fungus -> 1 Warped stem 100%, 1 warped fungus 25%

  
- Miners Delight:

  Cave Carrot -> 2 Cave carrot  

- Integrated Dynamics: 
  
  Menril Sapling ->  1 Menril log 100%, 1 menril sapling 25%, 1 crystalized menril chunk 15%
